free_text: -STUDY OF THE LI-6(N,A)T CROSS-SECTIONS IN THE ENERGY
RANGE BETWEEN 20 KEV AND 1700 KEV.- (IN FRENCH)
CADARACHE 5 MEV VAN DE GRAAFF, PULSED SOURCE
WAS USED RELATIVE TO A FLAT RESPONSE COUNTER WHICH WAS
CALIBRATED RELATIVE TO MANGANESE SULFATE BATH,
TIME OF FLIGHT, TO SEPARATE DIRECT NEUTRONS
FROM THOSE SCATTERED BY THE TARGET BACKLING.
CALIBRATED RELATIVE TO MANGANESE SULFATE BATH.
.LI-6 SCINTILLATOR AT 110 DEG FOR INCIDENT PROTON BEAM,
DISTANCE OF DETECTOR-TARGET VARIES 29 TO 100 CM.
2 BF3 COUNTERS AS FLAT RESPONCE COUNTERS IN
.LI-6 SCINTILLATOR AT 135 DEG FOR INCIDENT PROTON BEAM,
DISTANCES OF DETECTOR-TARGET ARE 40 AND 80 CM.
2 BF3 COUNTERS AS FLAT RESPONCE COUNTERS IN
.LI-6 SCINTILLATOR AT 20 DEG. FOR INCIDENT PROTON BEAM.
2 BF3 COUNTERS AS FLAT RESPONCE COUNTERS IN
SAME AS TABLE 4, PART 1 IN THESIS.
.LI-6 SCINTILLATOR AT 20 DEG. FOR INCIDENT PROTON BEAM.
2 BF3 COUNTERS AS FLAT RESPONCE COUNTERS IN
SAME AS TABLE 4, PART 2 IN THESIS.
.LI-6 SCINTILLATOR AT 20 DEG. FOR INCIDENT PROTON BEAM.
DISTANCES OF DETECTOR-TARGET ARE 25 AND 30 CM.
2 BF3 COUNTERS AS FLAT RESPONCE COUNTERS IN
SAME AS TABLE 5, PART 1 IN THESIS.
.LI-6 SCINTILLATOR AT 20 DEG. FOR INCIDENT PROTON BEAM.
2 BF3 COUNTERS AS FLAT RESPONCE COUNTERS IN
SAME AS TABLE 5, PART 2 IN THESIS.
